message:
fix(obligation): use crate::channel::mpsc for session transport and widen SessionTransport visibility

Change send_permit and lease session channel creation to use
crate::channel::mpsc::channel() instead of bare mpsc::channel(),
routing through the unified channel abstraction.

Widen SessionTransport visibility from private to pub(super) so
that send_permit and lease submodules can reference it directly in
their channel constructors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
